different_rework_body_rejected.description: Two distinct rework bodies around the same anchor are outside the singleton-body loop scope.

optional_skip_not_loop.description: A simple optional skip should stay an optional-sequence cut, not a loop.

single_rework_one_iteration_only.description: Without an observed zero-iteration exit, the bounded loop detector should not infer optional loop exit.

single_rework_zero_or_one.description: Observed A-C exit and one A-B-A-C rework iteration; a loop model should admit repeated B/A cycles.
